title: FILTER concatenation doesn't work with sameTerm
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ex_classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, class_uri VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE ex_instances (id INT PRIMARY KEY, class_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (class_id) REFERENCES ex_classes(id));
SELECT i.id FROM ex_instances i JOIN ex_classes c ON i.class_id = c.id WHERE (c.class_uri = 'http://example.com/A' OR c.class_uri = 'http://example.com/B');
key_bug_features: FILTER concatenation with sameTerm fails to return results
